name: Urza's Destiny

draft.notes: Foils inserted only between stripes, displacing a card of the same rarity. Possible to get multiple foils in one pack.

sourceNotes: Small set. Printed USA and Belgium; page only documents Belgian striped collation (pack order: 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 11 commons). US printing existence confirmed but no openings identified. Foil 1:100 cards. 36 packs per box.
